history_of_present_illness: Mr. Park reports a stressful week at work with a deadline. He noticed a higher BP reading after a tense meeting. He takes his medications regularly.

symptom_diary.entry: Rough day, big deadline. BP cuff read 158/98 after my 4pm meeting.

patient_concerns: Worried stress is affecting his heart.
sensitive_notes: Patient discusses anxiety/work stress; handle supportively and without judgment.
